title: The Skull Dome Battle Spreads
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Black Maria, Yamato, Unknown person #10, Brook, Unknown person #11 as Battles spread through the Skull Dome while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the alliance shift the momentum.
scene: Across the Skull Dome, the alliance fights to survive while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the Straw Hats change the flow of battle.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: .....!! How did you get in here!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You may have lured me here...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But did you really think catching a woman like me would be that simple?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've spent half of my life in unsavory organizations so,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: pardon me, but I already cut you free...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Big Sis, all the spider webs are breaking apart from the frost!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Seems like this is a good matchup for me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thanks!! I'm going to head to where kin'emon and the others are!! Huff... huff...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't know what it is... but I don't think I stand a chance here!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stop, Black Leg!! I won't let you escape!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sangoro's voice was coming out of this mouse!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see, so that was one of Luffy's friends.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My father's army has a scouting unit called the "MARYS".

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: This is one of their cyBorgs!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: They usually wander aimlessly around the island...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Everything they see is seen by their human counter- parts!!

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: Which means this place is probably...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, are you sure they're in this storeroom?

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: Nobody ever enters this cursed room...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Whoa!! There's so many of them!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They must've seen us!! This place isn't safe anymore!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's get out of here, Yamato!! We have to keep momonsuke-sama out of sight!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 48 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
